title.en: Rate the players in Panama v England
title.zh-CN: 为巴拿马v英格兰的球员评分

summary.en: Rate the Panama and England players out of 10 below and come back after full-time to see the final ratings.
summary.zh-CN: 给巴拿马和英格兰球员打分（满分10分） ，全职结束后再回来查看最终评分。

title.en: Gakpo asks for privacy after loss of unborn son
title.zh-CN: Gakpo在失去未出生的儿子后要求隐私

summary.en: Noa van der Bij, the partner of Liverpool and Netherlands forward Cody Gakpo, announces the pair have lost their unborn son.
summary.zh-CN: 利物浦和荷兰前锋Cody Gakpo的合伙人Noa van der Bij宣布，两人失去了未出生的儿子。

title.en: Scotland's World Cup hopes at 0.07% - these are results they need
title.zh-CN: 苏格兰世界杯希望达到0.07 ％ -这些是他们需要的结果

summary.en: Defeat against Brazil left Scotland in a precarious position, but little has gone their way since either.
summary.zh-CN: 对巴西的失利使苏格兰处于不稳定的境地，但从那时起，苏格兰也没有什么进展。

title.en: World Cup quiz: Name the team from England v Panama 2018
title.zh-CN: 世界杯测验：命名2018年英格兰对巴拿马的球队

summary.en: England face Panama for the first time since a 6-1 win at Russia 2018. Can you remember the starting XI?
summary.zh-CN: 自2018年俄罗斯6-1胜利以来，英格兰首次面对巴拿马。您还记得开头的XI吗？

title.en: VAR rules out late winner to deny Iran guaranteed last-32 spot
title.zh-CN: VAR排除迟到的赢家，否认伊朗有保证的最后32名

summary.en: Shoja Khalilzadeh's goal is ruled out by VAR in injury-time denying Iran automatic qualification into the round of 32, meaning they will have to wait on other results to see if they go through as one...
summary.zh-CN: Shoja Khalilzadeh的进球被VAR在伤病时间内排除在外，拒绝伊朗自动进入32轮资格赛，这意味着他们将不得不等待其他结果，看看他们是否能够作为一个...

title.en: Belgium thrash New Zealand to win Group G
title.zh-CN: 比利时击败新西兰赢得G组冠军

summary.en: Belgium defeat New Zealand 5-1 to qualify for the World Cup round of 32 as winners of Group G on goal difference.
summary.zh-CN: 比利时以5比1击败新西兰，获得32轮世界杯资格，成为G组进球差异的赢家。

title.en: Egypt through but late drama denies Iran guaranteed last 32 spot
title.zh-CN: 埃及通过但后期戏剧否认伊朗保证最后32名

summary.en: Iran have a goal ruled out for offside and hit the crossbar in the final moments of a thrilling 1-1 draw against Egypt in Seattle, leaving them hoping to secure qualification to the FIFA World Cup...
summary.zh-CN: 伊朗在越位方面被排除在外，并在西雅图对埃及的激动人心的1-1平局的最后时刻击中了横梁，让他们希望获得参加FIFA世界杯的资格......

title.en: Man Utd waiting on Ugarte injury after he leaves pitch on stretcher
title.zh-CN: 曼联等待Ugarte在担架上离开球场后受伤

summary.en: Manchester United are waiting to discover the extent of Manuel Ugarte's injury after the midfielder was stretchered off during Uruguay's World Cup defeat by Spain.
summary.zh-CN: 曼联正在等待发现曼努埃尔·乌加特在乌拉圭世界杯期间被西班牙击败后受伤的程度。

title.en: 'No one could see it coming' - Tuchel defends selection after James injury
title.zh-CN: “没有人能看到它的到来” -图切尔在詹姆斯受伤后为选择辩护

summary.en: Thomas Tuchel defends his full-back selections after confirming Reece James will miss the match against Panama through injury.
summary.zh-CN: 托马斯·图切尔（ Thomas Tuchel ）在确认里斯·詹姆斯（ Reece James ）将因伤缺席对阵巴拿马的比赛后，卫冕了他

title.en: Messi to start final Argentina group match on bench
title.zh-CN: 梅西将在替补席上开始阿根廷小组赛决赛

summary.en: World Cup top scorer Lionel Messi will start Argentina's final group match against Jordan on the bench, manager Lionel Scaloni confirms.
summary.zh-CN: 经理莱昂内尔·斯卡洛尼（ Lionel Scaloni ）证实，世界杯最佳射手莱昂内尔·梅西（ Lionel Messi ）将在替补席上开始阿根廷对阵约旦

title.en: We have been treated unfairly by USA - Iran
title.zh-CN: 我们受到美国-伊朗的不公平对待

summary.en: Iran coach Amir Ghalenoei says his nation have been treated unfairly by the United States during the World Cup
summary.zh-CN: 伊朗教练阿米尔·加勒诺埃说，他的国家在世界杯期间受到美国的不公平对待
